title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Prevention of Damage to Public Property Act, 1984. (2) It extends to the whole of India 1***. (3) It shall be deemed to have come into force on the 28th day of January, 1984.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10-2019).
